title: task
description: Policy: appendix-c-safety.md. Add __counted_by(len) to all flexible array members. Enables compile-time bounds checking in Clang 18+.
close_reason: No action needed: exhaustive search found no flexible array members in LICHEN headers. The codebase uses fixed-size arrays throughout, which is appropriate for embedded systems. __counted_by annotations would apply when FAMs are introduced.
